description_long: This object is a cylindrical sausage encased in a maroon plastic wrapper with white and gold accents, featuring Russian text and branding. The packaging is tightly sealed at both ends with a metal or plastic clip, giving it a typical processed meat appearance. The front side displays a prominent label with the brand name and product information, while the back and sides show additional details, barcodes, and a website URL. The surface of the packaging is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light in certain areas. The sausage appears dense and solid, suggesting a typical deli meat consistency inside. No visible toppings or grill marks are present, and the sausage is not placed on any surface or in a container.
description: A maroon, cylindrical sausage in a sealed plastic wrapper with Russian branding and product information, featuring smooth, glossy packaging and no visible toppings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon wrapper with barcodes and partial label text, sealed at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main product label, brand name, and detailed Russian text in gold and white on the maroon background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more barcode and label details, showing the curvature of the packaging.
description_view_3: Back view highlighting the website URL, additional product information, and regulatory markings on the maroon wrapper.
